projects.name: specorator
projects.description: Frontend interface and visualization layer. The primary entry point for users interacting with the Specorator ecosystem.

projects.name: specorator-runtime
projects.description: Core execution engine that orchestrates agents and workflows. Bridges the UI layer with the agent and workflow subsystems.

projects.name: agentonomous
projects.description: Library of autonomous agent definitions and behaviors. Provides the building blocks for intelligent task execution within the runtime.

projects.name: agentic-workflow
projects.description: Declarative workflow definition system. Enables composing and sequencing agent tasks into higher-level operational flows.
